text: 「異界に紡がれし知の化身」を５回クリア

緊急クエスト「異界に紡がれし知の化身」を
難度ハード以上で５回クリアしよう！

※トリガークエスト
「T：異界に紡がれし知の化身」でもクリア可能

Clear "Wisdom Incarnate, Created in Another
Dimension" 5 Times

Clear Urgent Quest "Wisdom Incarnate, Created
in Another Dimension" 5 times on Hard or above!

Note: Trigger Quest "T: Wisdom Incarnate, Created
in Another Dimension" counts toward the total.
